title: dortmanna madagascariensis
intro: Dortmanna madagascariensis, a tropical plant native to Madagascar, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the family Rutaceae, commonly known as the citrus family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which contains limonene and other compounds with antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. Dortmanna madagascariensis has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, fever, and skin conditions, due to its potential health benefits such as antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and fruits are used to make teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
